purpose: Separate case-level review scores, aggregate validation percentages, eICU outcome-proxy metrics, and eICU harmonized clinical-event metrics.

case_level_review_score.not_meaning: Not a patient-risk percentage and not a diagnosis

eicu_harmonized_clinical_event_t6.evidence_role: Newer eICU harmonized clinical-event labeling pass
eicu_harmonized_clinical_event_t6.event_definition: Harmonized clinical-event labeling intended to better align with the MIMIC clinical-event framework

public_framing: Do not merge these into one unlabeled eICU metric. Clearly label outcome-proxy versus harmonized clinical-event results.
guardrails: No diagnosis, treatment direction, clinician replacement, or independent escalation
